displayTitle: Doctor Aphra (2016) #27: Worst Among Equals Part II
synopsis:
**Worst Among Equals: Part Two!**

Rogue archaeologist Doctor Aphra has ten hours to cross a hostile megacity before the bomb implanted in her throat blows up. No big deal, right? And even if there are, say, insane cops and bounty hunters on her tail, she's got a partner to help her! (Unfortunately that would be Triple-Zero: the astonishingly unpleasant murder droid who yearns to see her dead.)
title: Doctor Aphra (2016) #27: Worst Among Equals Part II
